coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 65% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 98%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 98-98% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/1. 20:10 at 98%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 98% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 8:38. Then 31min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 8:38 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 31 minutes of work done. 31 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/3. 8:38 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 98% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 20:10 at 98%. Then 11min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 11min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 11min to contemplate your life choices. 98% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 98% × 20:10. Give it everything. 11min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 84% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 84% complete. Rep 1/1. 50% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 84% through. This is your workout. Own it. 50% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 84% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 84% into session. 50%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.
